description: Rare-spike curvature with μ=E[h] fixed. η < 2/μ (linear mean-field stable) and η large enough that the deterministic h≡μ map has no nonzero fixed points, yet the spike law is clearly bimodal. Typical steps use h=0 (nonlinear ± wells); rare h=h_high kicks. lag-1 > 0 ⇒ well-hopping / slow mixing, not classic flip period-2.
